name: execution-truth-layer
description: After each agent or automation run, verify your SQLite or Postgres rows match the tool-call log—not just OK responses

scripts.test:node:sqlite: node --test --test-force-exit test/reconciler.sqlite.test.mjs test/pipeline.sqlite.test.mjs test/withWorkflowVerification.test.mjs test/workflowTruthReport.test.mjs test/cli.test.mjs test/stable-failure-consistency.test.mjs test/workflow-result-consumer-contract.test.mjs test/workflow-result-stdout-version.test.mjs test/docs-relational-ssot.test.mjs test/tools-registry-relational-surface.test.mjs test/docs-contract.test.mjs test/docs-remediation-doctrine.test.mjs test/bundle-signature-fixture.test.mjs test/bundle-signature-codes-doc.test.mjs test/bundle-signature-cli-write.test.mjs test/quick-verify.sqlite.test.mjs
scripts.test:postgres: node scripts/pg-ci-init.mjs && node --test --test-force-exit test/postgres-session-readonly.test.mjs test/postgres-privilege.test.mjs test/pipeline.postgres.test.mjs test/ci-workflow-truth-postgres-contract.test.mjs test/quick-verify.postgres.test.mjs
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test:vitest && npm run test:node:sqlite && node scripts/first-run.mjs && node scripts/quick-verify-contract.mjs && node scripts/quick-verify-sql-allowlist.mjs && npm run validate-ttfv
scripts.test:ci: npm run build && npm run test:vitest && npm run test:node:sqlite && npm run test:postgres && npx playwright install chromium && npm run test:debug-ui && node scripts/first-run.mjs && node scripts/quick-verify-contract.mjs && node scripts/quick-verify-sql-allowlist.mjs && npm run validate-ttfv
